heading: Dragon Messmer
summary: Dedicated to stakeholder satisfaction and clean, elegantly functional software. I bring deep technical problem solving expertise, a cross functional collaborative, product-driven mindset. Renowned for my stakeholder-centric focus, I’ve frequently been requested by name for my attention to detail and dedication to delivering solutions that align with clients’ visions. While my core strength lies in frontend development, I’ve consistently excelled in full-stack roles, demonstrating adaptability and quick learning.

experience.where: Equity Prime Mortgage, Remotely from Oakland, CA, USA
experience.what: Private Mortgage loan company; TPO portal, SaaS application.
experience.project: EPMX: highly configurable, SaaS app, Next.js/React, Typescript front-end, UI/UX implementation with a NodeJS/Express/MongoDB/Redis and encompass, back-end.
accomplishments: **Configuration Driven Agility:** Planned and designed strategies to implement a rules-based, configuration-driven approach across all app areas, thereby enhancing agility in adapting to evolving business requirements.

**Help System Design:** Designed and implemented the EPMX’s integrated, configurable, searchable help system, providing users with contextual suggestions, searchable help documents, videos, and links.
**Design System Improvements:** Expanded, extended and generally improved components in EPM’s proprietary UI component library, increasing utility and ease of configuration across the app.
**Reusable Code Development:** Crafted numerous reusable components and hooks that could be used across the application, eliminating the need for repetitive copy-paste implementations.
**Process Improvements:** Improved team processes, including standards for PR descriptions,inter-team communication, sprint cadence, code reviews, QA and automated testing.
**Strategic Planning:** Actively participated in solution planning and technical strategy development.

experience.where: Home Point Financial Corporation, Remotely from Oakland, CA, USA
experience.what: Publicly traded mortgage loan company: TPO portal, SaaS application serving 10k active broker firms with 90k users.
experience.project: The Point:SaaS app, Next.js/React, Typescript front-end, UI/UX implementation with a C# and encompass, back-end.
accomplishments: **Frontend Code Standards:** Guided technical design and established code standards for the new version of the front-end application, ensuring the new app had a scalable, maintainable modern codebase.
**Reusable Code Development:** Transmuted confusing code through iterative refactoring into clean, reusable components using React hooks, cutting 75% of development time.
**Automated Testing Achievement:** Achieved 80%+ test coverage, utilizing husky to automate testing in Jest and testing-library/react before the code left the local environment, and again on GitHub.
**Recognized for Impactful:** Recognized company wide, on 2 separate occasions, for quick and flawless implementation of high visibility, front end changes including a total re-brand.

experience.where: UniteU, Remotely from Rochester, NY, USA
experience.what: Small private company: e-commerce solutions providing customized templates prior to modern dominant platforms like Shopify. Pioneer in Responsive site design.
experience.project: Collaborated with clients, product managers, and other developers to create and customize ASP.NET e-commerce sites, utilizing Less and jQuery.
accomplishments: **High Visibility Client Retention:** Preferred developer of demanding, high visibility clients (Nancy Meyer, Joes Jeans, Golf Galaxy) resulting in retention of important customers.
**Innovation in Responsive design:** Provided the company a competitive edge by creating a fully responsive, and backward compatible template, using HTML5 and custom CSS3.
**Animated Design Implementation:** Transformed customer relations with Hickey Freeman through implementation of challenging animated background design.
**Pixel Perfect Design Execution:** Delighted Hyde Park Jewelers with pixel perfect design implementation, saving the account.

additionalExperience.where: (Skullyflower.com)[https://www.skullyflower.com], personal project/playground. In the process of updating the codebase. Created an electron companion app for updating the content.
(RARR-Recovery.org)[https://rarr-recovery.org] — Horror inspired and Humorous 12 step recovery app soon to be ported to Electron and React Native
(Disconnected Software)[https://disconnected-software.com] - Coming soon! Will house my punk, DIY apps.
